title: ReportSchedule
description: Schedule configuration for automated report generation and delivery.

repeats.description: The interval at which the report is run. Acceptable values are DAILY, WEEKLY, MONTHLY, or QUARTERLY.

every.description: Defines every how many days, weeks, or months the report should be run.

startDate.description: Start date of the scheduled reports.

expirationDate.description: The expiration date when the scheduled report stops running.

runsOnDayOfMonth.description: Enum to define for MONTHLY and QUARTERLY schedules whether reports should be repeated on the same day of the month or the same day of the week.

timezone.description: The timezone for the report schedule.
